chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1557 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution Petitioner’s counsel not complied with o/objections 25-04-2025 Mr. Asadullah Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. **** Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
